description: Board kernel rules governing determinism, scoring, and queue assignment

determinism.description: All quest evaluations must be deterministic given the same seed and inputs
rules: Every quest evaluation must produce identical output given identical (seed, input_state) pairs
No external randomness sources permitted during evaluation
Floating-point operations must use IEEE 754 double precision with round-to-nearest-even
State transitions must be serializable and replayable
Quests are assigned to evaluation queues by station number modulo queue_count
Queue count is determined by available evaluator capacity
Priority ordering within queue: Crown > Storm > TempleRite > Community > Guild > Solo
Stale quests (age > epoch_clamp epochs) are deprioritized to the tail
Repair quests inherit the priority of their target claim
